posts.author: Pranith (Pranith Fernando)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We are currently using Microsoft planner for internal measurements and progress of the team, we are also connected with Monday to provide reports to the management on the progress of each project. Right now we are duplicating our work by completing items on both platforms, appreciate if someone could share some insights on integrating Monday with planner

Thanks,
Pranith

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Pranith

I am not aware of any integration with Planner. I did a quick check and it appers that Planner is supported by a GraphQL API which should make it possible to write any integration you want. However this require programming skills. PM me if you want to discuss furter.

Cheers,
Bas

posts.author: Pranith (Pranith Fernando)
posts.cookedHtml: @basdebruin Thanks a lot for the swift response. could you share your email ID and i will reach out to you for further information and assistance on this
